fields.name: marker radius#max distance between the unit and the marker
marker cone angle#angle from marker forward the unit must be
marker facing angle#angle from unit facing the marker must be
min targetable position threshold#above this value and below the max, object becomes targetable
max targetable position threshold#below this value and above the min, object becomes targetable

options: requires line of sight for interaction
only active when parent is hostile#This flag has no effect if the device is parented to a non unit
